idea: Natural Gas Spot Price Spike Triggers Utility Volatility Crush

data.source: FRED series DHHNGSP (Henry Hub Natural Gas Spot Price) daily

behavior: When natural gas spot prices jump >8% in a single day, utilities face immediate margin compression and hedging repricing. This creates a short-term tactical opportunity as the market reprices utility equity risk.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities are direct consumers of natural gas input costs; sudden price spikes compress earnings guidance and trigger sell-offs in dividend stocks.

trade_logic.entry: XLU closes down >1.5% on a day when DHHNGSP rises >8% from prior close
trade_logic.exit: XLU closes up >1% from entry or 7 calendar days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Natural gas prices are volatile; 8%+ daily moves occur 3–5 times per quarter, making this a realistic monthly signal.

idea: Lumber Futures Volatility Spike Signals Construction Cost Shock

data.source: Yahoo Finance continuous lumber futures (CL=F) daily price via price_only adapter

behavior: Lumber prices swing sharply on housing demand shocks and forestry disruptions. A 5%+ daily move in lumber signals incoming margin pressure for homebuilders and building materials suppliers.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials and building-materials companies face near-term input cost inflation; the market reprices earnings downward.

trade_logic.entry: CL=F rises or falls >5% in a single day; simultaneously XLI closes down >0.8%
trade_logic.exit: XLI outperforms SPY by >1% over 2 consecutive days or 10 calendar days pass

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Lumber futures exhibit >5% swings 2–4 times monthly due to weather, mills, and inventory news.

idea: Open-Metoe Heavy Rain Forecast Triggers Agricultural Commodity Bounce

data.source: Open-Meteo weather API 14-day precipitation forecast for US Corn Belt (centroid: Iowa)

behavior: When forecasts shift to heavy rain (>1.5 inches predicted within 7 days) in the Corn Belt, crop stress eases and commodity prices rebound on favorable moisture outlook.

market_impact.rationale: Agricultural commodity prices rise on improved crop conditions; materials and mining stocks often co-move with commodity sentiment.

trade_logic.entry: Open-Meteo forecast updates to >1.5 inches rain within 7 days AND agricultural commodity ETFs (DBC, AGF) rise >1.2% same day
trade_logic.exit: Agricultural ETF closes down >0.5% from entry or 8 calendar days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather forecasts update daily; rain forecast swings occur 2–3 times per month during growing season.

idea: Google Trends Spike In 'Recession Proof Job' Searches Signals Labor Market Anxiety

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'recession proof jobs' and 'job security'

behavior: When job-security searches surge (>40% week-over-week), labor market sentiment deteriorates. Workers fear layoffs, signaling incoming unemployment data will disappoint.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary companies depend on wage growth and job security; rising job anxiety predicts lower discretionary spending.

trade_logic.entry: Google Trends 'recession proof jobs' index jumps >40% week-over-week; XLY closes down >0.6% same week
trade_logic.exit: XLY closes up >0.8% from entry or 3 weeks elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Job anxiety spikes emerge 1–2 times per month around earnings seasons and macro shocks.

idea: RSS Feed Count Surge On Freight Congestion News Triggers Bearish Logistics Rotation

data.source: RSS feed count aggregation for 'freight congestion', 'trucking backlog', 'port delay' across major logistics news feeds

behavior: When logistics/freight RSS mentions spike (>25% daily jump), transportation bottlenecks are intensifying. This predicts higher costs and demand headwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial transport and logistics companies face margin pressure; supply-chain stress triggers sector rotation out of cyclicals.

trade_logic.entry: RSS count for freight/congestion keywords jumps >25% day-over-day; IYT (transportation ETF) closes down >1% same day
trade_logic.exit: IYT closes up >1.2% from entry or 5 trading days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight news volatility generates >25% RSS spikes 1–2 times per week on average.

idea: EV Charger Count Growth Slowdown Signals EV Subsidy Cliff Ahead

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily EV charger count (US total) via openchargemap adapter

behavior: When weekly EV charger growth drops below 0.3% (i.e., rollover in new installations), it signals waning subsidy tailwinds and slowing EV infrastructure buildout sentiment.

market_impact.rationale: EV-related tech and semiconductor stocks rally on infrastructure optimism; slowdown in charger deployment signals reduced future demand for EV chips.

trade_logic.entry: Weekly EV charger growth (7-day percent change) falls below 0.3% AND semiconductor ETF (SOXX) closes down >0.9% on same week
trade_logic.exit: SOXX closes up >1% from entry or 2 weeks elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV infrastructure growth is lumpy; 0.3% weekly threshold is crossed 2–3 times per quarter.

idea: Earthquake Activity Spike In Refining Regions Signals Energy Supply Risk Premium

data.source: USGS earthquake activity API for magnitude >4.0 events in US Gulf Coast / California refining zones

behavior: When earthquake activity picks up in major refining regions (Gulf Coast, California), energy prices spike on supply-disruption fear. Crude and refined-product margins widen.

market_impact.rationale: Energy stocks benefit from higher crude prices and refinery margin expansion when supply disruption fears emerge.

trade_logic.entry: USGS logs 1+ magnitude >4.0 earthquake in Gulf Coast / California refining zone; crude oil (CL=F) closes up >2% same day; XLE closes up >1.5%
trade_logic.exit: XLE closes down >0.8% from entry or 6 trading days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Refining-zone earthquakes >4.0 occur 1–2 times per month on average; crude is highly sensitive to supply shock fears.

idea: VIX Intraday Crush Into Close Signals Options Gamma Squeeze Bounce

data.source: Yahoo Finance intraday VIX price (^VIX) via price_only adapter, 15-minute bars

behavior: When VIX drops >15% from intraday high to close (gamma squeeze), options dealers are forced to buy equity hedges into close, triggering a momentum bounce the next day.

market_impact.rationale: Gamma-driven rallies lift risk appetite; consumer discretionary and growth sectors lead the bounce.

trade_logic.entry: VIX intraday high to close decline >15%; SPY closes flat or down; buy SPY at close
trade_logic.exit: SPY closes up >0.8% from entry or 3 trading days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: VIX intraday volatility and gamma squeezes occur 2–4 times per week on average.

idea: Steel Price Surge On China Manufacturing PMI Surprise Triggers Industrials Rally

data.source: FRED series CSCICP03CHM (China Manufacturing PMI) weekly + Yahoo Finance steel futures (USO proxy) daily

behavior: When China PMI beats expectations by >1 point AND steel prices surge >3%, global demand expectations improve. Industrials and materials rally on improved cycle outlook.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial companies depend on global construction and manufacturing demand; China PMI strength signals near-term capex and infrastructure spend.

trade_logic.entry: China PMI data beats consensus by >1 point; steel/materials ETF (DBB or SLV) rises >2% same week; XLI closes up >0.5%
trade_logic.exit: XLI closes down >0.6% from entry or 10 calendar days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: China PMI is released monthly; beats/misses occur ~40% of the time, making this a realistic signal 1–2 times per quarter.

idea: High Yield Bond Spread Widening Spike Signals Credit Fear Flight-to-Quality

data.source: FRED series BAMLH0A0HYM2 (High Yield OAS spread) daily

behavior: When HY OAS spreads widen >30 bps in a single day, credit stress emerges. Flight-to-quality rotations out of consumer discretionary and cyclicals into utilities and staples.

market_impact.rationale: Credit tightening signals economic stress and weakening consumer balance sheets; discretionary spending declines.

trade_logic.entry: HY OAS widens >30 bps day-over-day; XLY closes down >0.7%; simultaneous buy XLP (staples)
trade_logic.exit: HY OAS tightens >15 bps from widening day or 6 trading days elapse

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Credit spreads fluctuate sharply 1–2 times per week; >30 bps daily moves occur 2–3 times per month on average.
